plugins.name: itr-tax
plugins.description: Expert assistant for filing an Indian ITR-2 under the new tax regime via the online e-filing wizard, for a salaried taxpayer with capital gains and foreign assets/income (RSU/ESPP/ETF/dividends + FTC/Form 67). Covers Schedule S/OS/CG/112A/FSI/TR/FA/AL, AIS/TIS/26AS validation, portal CSV uploads, and a pre-submission multi-model JSON audit.
